decision.summary: No new action: the new weekly slate is not live in this snapshot, and the available floor setup is not cleanly aligned with the thesis.
decision.rationale: State reconciliation is clean and there are no open positions, but this 04:00 UTC snapshot still only shows expiring April 13-19 weekly markets rather than the fresh weekly board we want to enter early. The latest Beecthor thesis remains bearish and still favors downside continuation more than a clean support-hold scenario, so forcing the available 74k floor Yes market would lean against the current directional read. With no fresh weekly markets live yet and no daily price-hit setup offering a clear edge, the correct action is to stay flat and wait for the real new weekly slate or a cleaner support thesis.
